return(function(Y,A,c,I,D,k,m,h,M,B,n,W,X,u,a,t,s,K,N,d,r,x)t,M,X,N,h,n,u,d,W,s,B,r,a,K,x={},function(Y)local T,B=-436316-(-436317),Y[-754412+754413]while B do
